name: Mark Soskin
abstract: Mark Samuel Soskin (born 1953) is an American jazz pianist based in New York City.

works.t: East of the Sun (and West of the Moon)

concerts.label: Salute: Antonio Carlos Jobim

quotes.text: No. Absolutely not. You know what? Once I played Carnegie Hall and they came that was when they changed. They said he must be a good musician, he’s playing at Carnegie Hall. So you know I mean it all fell into place. I was lucky.
quotes.caption: Vague recollection of playing Carnegie Hall
